## Cookies

### COO-001

- **Impact:** serious
- **Issue:** Cookie "_gcl_au" is missing the Secure flag
- **Location:** `_gcl_au (.kaiserpermanentejobs.org)`
- **URL:** https://www.kaiserpermanentejobs.org/
- **Reference:** https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Set-Cookie#secure
- **Fix:** Set the Secure attribute on the "_gcl_au" cookie so it is only transmitted over HTTPS.

### COO-002

- **Impact:** moderate
- **Issue:** Cookie "SearchVisitorId" is missing the HttpOnly flag
- **Location:** `SearchVisitorId (www.kaiserpermanentejobs.org)`
- **URL:** https://www.kaiserpermanentejobs.org/
- **Reference:** https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Set-Cookie#httponly
- **Fix:** Set the HttpOnly attribute on the "SearchVisitorId" cookie to prevent JavaScript access and reduce XSS risk.

- **URL:** https://www.kaiserpermanentejobs.org/
- **Reference:** https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Set-Cookie#httponly
- **Fix:** Set the HttpOnly attribute on the "CookieBehavior" cookie to prevent JavaScript access and reduce XSS risk.

### COO-006

- **Impact:** moderate
- **Issue:** Cookie "_ga" has a lifetime exceeding 1 year (expires 2027-07-20)
- **Location:** `_ga (.kaiserpermanentejobs.org)`
- **URL:** https://www.kaiserpermanentejobs.org/
- **Reference:** https://ico.org.uk/for-organisations/uk-gdpr-guidance-and-resources/cookies-and-similar-technologies/cookies-and-similar-technologies/
- **Fix:** Reduce the expiry of the "_ga" cookie to 12 months or less as required by GDPR data minimisation principles.

## Security Headers

### SEC-001

- **Impact:** moderate
- **Issue:** Missing Permissions-Policy header
- **Location:** `https://kaiserpermanentejobs.org/`
- **URL:** https://kaiserpermanentejobs.org/
- **Reference:** https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Permissions-Policy
- **Fix:** Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (e.g. "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()") and reduce the attack surface.

### SEC-002

- **Impact:** minor
- **Issue:** Missing Referrer-Policy header
- **Location:** `https://kaiserpermanentejobs.org/`
- **URL:** https://kaiserpermanentejobs.org/
- **Reference:** https://owasp.org/www-project-secure-headers/#referrer-policy
- **Fix:** Add a Referrer-Policy header (e.g. "strict-origin-when-cross-origin") to control how much referrer information is sent with requests.
